hero.subtitle: Reliable renewable energy solutions built on decades of engineering experience.

story.p1: ERC International was founded in Moldova in 2022 with the aim of providing reliable solutions in the field of renewable energy. Our parent company, ERC Sistem, is a well-established firm in the industry with extensive experience and engineering knowledge accumulated over the years in Turkey. Built on this strong foundation, ERC International aims to contribute to energy projects on a global scale.
story.p2: Our company develops environmentally friendly projects focused on renewable energy sources such as solar and wind energy and works to contribute to a sustainable future. Offering solutions for design, material supply, installation, and energy storage for both residential and industrial-scale projects, ERC International provides innovative solutions to its clients through integrated services.
story.p3: At ERC International, we aim to bring our experience in the energy sector to the international arena, shaping the future with reliable, sustainable, and environmentally friendly projects. We continue to work towards making energy more efficient and accessible while maintaining customer satisfaction and quality at the highest level.
